samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">First operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">Second operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag, set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="ADD">6'b100000</parameter>
        <parameter id="ADDU">6'b100001</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUB">6'b100010</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUBU">6'b100011</parameter>
        <parameter id="AND">6'b100100</parameter>
        <parameter id="OR">6'b100101</parameter>
        <parameter id="XOR">6'b100110</parameter>
        <parameter id="NOR">6'b100111</parameter>
        <parameter id="SLT">6'b101010</parameter>
        <parameter id="SLTU">6'b101011</parameter>
        <parameter id="SLL">6'b000000</parameter>
        <parameter id="SRL">6'b000010</parameter>
        <parameter id="SRA">6'b000011</parameter>
        <parameter id="SLLV">6'b000100</parameter>
        <parameter id="SRLV">6'b000110</parameter>
        <parameter id="SRAV">6'b000111</parameter>
        <parameter id="LUI">6'b001111</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="sll_shift_amount" expression="a[4:0]" />
        <assign id="srl_shift_amount" expression="a[4:0]" />
        <assign id="sra_shift_amount" expression="a[4:0]" />
        <assign id="sllv_shift_amount" expression="a" />
        <assign id="srlv_shift_amount" expression="a" />
        <assign id="srav_shift_amount" expression="a" />
        <assign id="lui_upper_bits" expression="a[15:0]" />
        <assign id="lui_lower_bits" expression="32'h00000000" />
        <assign id="add_result" expression="signed_a + signed_b" />
        <assign id="sub_result" expression="signed_a - signed_b" />
        <assign id="and_result" expression="unsigned_a & unsigned_b" />
        <assign id="or_result" expression="unsigned_a | unsigned_b" />
        <assign id="xor_result" expression="unsigned_a ^ unsigned_b" />
        <assign id="nor_result" expression="~(unsigned_a | unsigned_b)" />
        <assign id="slt_result" expression="(signed_a < signed_b ? 1 : 0)" />
        <assign id="sltu_result" expression="(unsigned_a < unsigned_b ? 1 : 0)" />
        <assign id="sll_result" expression="unsigned_a << sll_shift_amount" />
        <assign id="srl_result" expression="unsigned_a >> srl_shift_amount" />
        <assign id="sra_result" expression="signed_a >>> sra_shift_amount" />
        <assign id="sllv_result" expression="unsigned_a << sllv_shift_amount" />
        <assign id="srlv_result" expression="unsigned_a >> srlv_shift_amount" />
        <assign id="srav_result" expression="signed_a >>> srav_shift_amount" />
        <assign id="lui_result" expression="{lui_upper_bits, lui_lower_bits}" />
        <always>
            <case id="operation_select">
                <when condition="aluc == ADD">
                    <assign id="r" expression="add_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == ADDU">
                    <assign id="r" expression="add_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SUB">
                    <assign id="r" expression="sub_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SUBU">
                    <assign id="r" expression="sub_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == AND">
                    <assign id="r" expression="and_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == OR">
                    <assign id="r" expression="or_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == XOR">
                    <assign id="r" expression="xor_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == NOR">
                    <assign id="r" expression="nor_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLT">
                    <assign id="r" expression="slt_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLTU">
                    <assign id="r" expression="sltu_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLL">
                    <assign id="r" expression="sll_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRL">
                    <assign id="r" expression="srl_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRA">
                    <assign id="r" expression="sra_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLLV">
                    <assign id="r" expression="sllv_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRLV">
                    <assign id="r" expression="srlv_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRAV">
                    <assign id="r" expression="srav_result" />
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == LUI">
                    <assign id="r" expression="lui_result" />
                </when>
                <default>
                    <assign id="r" expression="32'hzzzzzzzz" />
                </default>
            </case>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Performs arithmetic and logical operations based on the control signal (aluc).</implementation>
</module>
